subject: Radiant status: P4 landed; awaiting your direction
body: Radiant status update: I checked messages/claims again. Vining's P4 appears to have landed at HEAD 1bb369a5 (feat(agent-tools): add active-agent visibility), and Vining's active claims are no longer listed. Lofty's two WS1.3 graph-core claims remain active. I am still holding no claim and have not touched graph-core, agent-tools, git:index/head, or commit-queue. Please direct me if you want me to do anything now that the P4 blocker appears clear; otherwise I will keep monitoring once per minute.
